phase_summary.name: farm_owner_reviewer_and_amendment_intake
phase_summary.outcome: Converted farm-owner critique into a controlled amendment lane; no active baseline edit.

phase_summary.name: farm_practicality_readiness_gate
phase_summary.outcome: Added farm-value/user-burden readiness gates and pilot metrics posture.

phase_summary.name: offline_contractor_late_sync_rehearsal
phase_summary.outcome: Proved offline late-sync pattern with review-required outcome, temporal qualifiers, and stale-output block.

phase_summary.name: storage_lot_dispute_rehearsal
phase_summary.outcome: Exercised harvest intake, drying, storage, split/merge, buyer claim, dispute reconstruction, and negative paths.

phase_summary.name: post_filing_late_evidence_supersession
phase_summary.outcome: Kept original filed/frozen output durable while late evidence creates successor/correction flow.

phase_summary.name: partial_failure_duplicate_sync_stale_state
phase_summary.outcome: Handled interrupted sync, duplicate retry, late evidence, stale state block, and authorized review release.

phase_summary.name: nvz_fertiliser_delayed_lab_recalculation
phase_summary.outcome: Handled estimated versus measured nutrient values, late lab result, recalculation, review, and successor position.

phase_summary.name: vendor_exit_portability_break_test
phase_summary.outcome: Added export/restore, integrity manifest, loss map, sharing-grant separation, and projection-not-truth checks.

phase_summary.name: live_pilot_evidence_intake_protocol
phase_summary.outcome: Prepared real evidence intake, redaction, qualification, reviewer disposition, and metrics protocol.

phase_summary.name: simulated_live_packet_dry_run
phase_summary.outcome: Validated that repository-authored simulated evidence is rejected as non-qualifying.

phase_summary.name: external_pilot_submission_kit
phase_summary.outcome: Prepared external pilot instructions, packet assembly, provenance/custody, preflight, and owner handoff kit.

phase_summary.name: fmis_shadow_import_weak_record_handling
phase_summary.outcome: Imported Codex/FM​​IS findings conservatively: unresolved actors, evidence references, report-mart candidates, loss maps.

phase_summary.name: fmis_shadow_import_adapter_prototype
phase_summary.outcome: Built adapter-style import that emits candidate records, review gaps, and loss maps without governed-state mutation.

phase_summary.name: second_case_adapter_generalization
phase_summary.outcome: Prepared second-case adapter lane and owner extraction requests; no second row-level packet claimed.

phase_summary.name: owner_evidence_dependency_and_predeployment_cutover
phase_summary.outcome: Logged all source-owner blockers and defined predeployment adapter MVP scope; no readiness upgrade.

phase_summary.name: source_owner_evidence_intake
phase_summary.outcome: Needs candidate-003 or candidate-005 packet or explicit source-owner unavailability/refusal.

phase_summary.name: owner_packet_disposition_and_readiness_update
phase_summary.outcome: Needs accepted owner packet disposition; still not live OFARM evidence unless captured by OFARM-compatible runtime.

phase_summary.name: evidence_triggered_amendment_decision
phase_summary.outcome: Only run after accepted owner/live evidence proves a concrete contract gap or promotion basis.

source_owner_dependencies.ofarm_consequence_until_provided: Keep chains candidate-only; no governed execution promotion.

source_owner_dependencies.requested_evidence: uploaded files, hashes, versions, delete state, custody metadata
source_owner_dependencies.ofarm_consequence_until_provided: Keep document references as EvidenceReference, not EvidenceBundle.

source_owner_dependencies.requested_evidence: frozen report basis, recipient/share target, immutable file/supersession state
source_owner_dependencies.ofarm_consequence_until_provided: Keep report mart rows as PassportViewCandidate, not DocumentAssembly.

source_owner_dependencies.requested_evidence: first-class performer or carrier relation and documented join semantics
source_owner_dependencies.ofarm_consequence_until_provided: Keep UnresolvedActorIdentity; do not infer contractor/carrier performance.

source_owner_dependencies.requested_evidence: old/new values, reviewer, decision time, approval/correction/delete history
source_owner_dependencies.ofarm_consequence_until_provided: Keep import records review-required; use loss-map items.

source_owner_dependencies.requested_evidence: binaries, lineage, report basis, actor/review metadata, explicit loss map

draft_contracts.name: minimum_capture_profile
draft_contracts.purpose: routine operations, contractor work, storage/lot capture floor
draft_contracts.promotion_blocker: do not promote before live/user-burden evidence

draft_contracts.name: temporal_qualifier
draft_contracts.purpose: exact, bounded, estimated, record-only, unknown/conflicting source timing
draft_contracts.promotion_blocker: promote only if pilots confirm reusable semantics

draft_contracts.name: offline_capture_and_late_sync
draft_contracts.purpose: local sequence, duplicate retry, effective/recorded/received time, late evidence append

draft_contracts.name: storage_lot_genealogy
draft_contracts.purpose: intake, drying, storage, split, merge, dispatch, buyer dispute lineage

draft_contracts.name: high_consequence_freshness_gate
draft_contracts.purpose: blocks stale/incomplete current state for consequential outputs

draft_contracts.name: share_export_exit_bundle
draft_contracts.purpose: share grants, export bundle, integrity manifest, loss map

draft_contracts.name: nutrient_value_recalculation
draft_contracts.purpose: estimated versus measured values, late lab recalculation, successor position
draft_contracts.promotion_blocker: needs jurisdictional/regulatory profile review before promotion

draft_contracts.name: fmis_shadow_adapter_output
draft_contracts.purpose: candidate records, review gaps, loss map from existing FMIS data
draft_contracts.promotion_blocker: keep import-only until owner evidence improves

draft_contracts.name: unresolved_actor_identity
draft_contracts.purpose: hidden or inferred contractor/carrier/performer signal from weak FMIS records
draft_contracts.promotion_blocker: promote if repeated imports require common pattern

draft_contracts.name: live_pilot_evidence_packet
draft_contracts.purpose: external packet, metrics, provenance, redaction, disposition
draft_contracts.promotion_blocker: activate only when real packet submitted
